description: Calls Slack usergroups.list for the workspace’s user groups (subteams). Each item includes id and handle for mentions. Pagination: pass cursor from response_metadata.next_cursor.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from response_metadata.next_cursor on the prior response.

limit.description: Page size (subject to Slack’s API limits).

include_disabled.description: When true, include disabled user groups in the listing (Slack usergroups.list include_disabled).
